verses.latin_vulgate: Domum autem suam ædificavit Salomon tredecim annis, et ad perfectum usque perduxit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־בֵּיתוֹ֙ בָּנָ֣ה שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה שְׁלֹ֥שׁ עֶשְׂרֵ֖ה שָׁנָ֑ה וַיְכַ֖ל אֶת־כׇּל־בֵּיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon built his own house in thirteen years, and brought it to perfection.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Salomo rakensi huonettansa kolmetoistakymmentä ajastaikaa, ennenkuin se täydellisesti valmiiksi tuli.
verses.king_james: But Solomon was building his own house thirteen years, and he finished all his house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificavit quoque domum saltus Libani centum cubitorum longitudinis, et quinquaginta cubitorum latitudinis, et triginta cubitorum altitudinis : et quatuor deambulacra inter columnas cedrinas : ligna quippe cedrina exciderat in columnas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֜בֶן אֶת־בֵּ֣ית ׀ יַ֣עַר הַלְּבָנ֗וֹן מֵאָ֨ה אַמָּ֤ה אׇרְכּוֹ֙ וַחֲמִשִּׁ֤ים אַמָּה֙ רׇחְבּ֔וֹ וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים אַמָּ֖ה קוֹמָת֑וֹ עַ֗ל אַרְבָּעָה֙ טוּרֵי֙ עַמּוּדֵ֣י אֲרָזִ֔ים וּכְרֻת֥וֹת אֲרָזִ֖ים עַל־הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He built also the house of the forest of Libanus; the length of it was a hundred cubits, and the breadth fifty cubits, and the height thirty cubits: and four galleries between pillars of cedar: for he had cut cedar trees into pillars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän rakensi Libanonin metsästä huoneen, sata kyynärää pituudelle, viisikymmentä kyynärää leveydelle ja kolmekymmentä kyynärää korkeudelle; neljällä taholla olivat sedripuiset patsaat, ja vuollut sedripuiset kaaret patsasten päällä.
verses.king_james: He built also the house of the forest of Lebanon; the length thereof was an hundred cubits, and the breadth thereof fifty cubits, and the height thereof thirty cubits, upon four rows of cedar pillars, with cedar beams upon the pillars.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tabulatis cedrinis vestivit totam cameram, quæ quadraginta quinque columnis sustentabatur. Unus autem ordo habebat columnas quindecim
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְסָפֻ֣ן בָּאֶ֗רֶז מִמַּ֙עַל֙ עַל־הַצְּלָעוֹת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עַל־הָעַמּוּדִ֔ים אַרְבָּעִ֖ים וַחֲמִשָּׁ֑ה חֲמִשָּׁ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר הַטּֽוּר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he covered the whole vault with boards of cedar, and it was held up with five and forty pillars. And one row had fifteen pillars,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se oli peitetty sedripuisilla laudoilla ylhäältä kaarten ylitse, jotka olivat patsasten päällä, joita oli viisiviidettäkymmentä, viisitoistakymmentä kullakin taholla,
verses.king_james: And it was covered with cedar above upon the beams, that lay on forty five pillars, fifteen in a row.

verses.latin_vulgate: contra se invicem positas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁקֻפִ֖ים שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה טוּרִ֑ים וּמֶחֱזָ֥ה אֶל־מֶחֱזָ֖ה שָׁלֹ֥שׁ פְּעָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Set one against another,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kolme akkunariviä, kolmeen kertaan suutasuuksin.
verses.king_james: And there were windows in three rows, and light was against light in three ranks.

verses.latin_vulgate: et e regione se respicientes, æquali spatio inter columnas, et super columnas quadrangulata ligna in cunctis æqualia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכׇל־הַפְּתָחִ֥ים וְהַמְּזוּז֖וֹת רְבֻעִ֣ים שָׁ֑קֶף וּמ֧וּל מֶחֱזָ֛ה אֶל־מֶחֱזָ֖ה שָׁלֹ֥שׁ פְּעָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And looking one upon another, with equal space between the pillars, and over the pillars were square beams in all things equal.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki ovet ja pihtipielet olivat nelikulmaiset, ja akkunat suutasuuksin kolmeen kertaan.
verses.king_james: And all the doors and posts were square, with the windows: and light was against light in three ranks.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et porticum columnarum fecit quinquaginta cubitorum longitudinis, et triginta cubitorum latitudinis : et alteram porticum in facie majoris porticus : et columnas, et epistylia super columnas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֨ת אוּלָ֤ם הָֽעַמּוּדִים֙ עָשָׂ֔ה חֲמִשִּׁ֤ים אַמָּה֙ אׇרְכּ֔וֹ וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים אַמָּ֖ה רׇחְבּ֑וֹ וְאוּלָם֙ עַל־פְּנֵיהֶ֔ם וְעַמֻּדִ֥ים וְעָ֖ב עַל־פְּנֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made a porch of pillars of fifty cubits in length, and thirty cubits in breadth: and another porch before the greater porch, and pillars, and chapiters upon the pillars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän rakensi myös patsasten esihuoneen, viisikymmentä kyynärää pituudelle ja kolmekymmentä kyynärää laveudelle; ja esihuone oli niiden kohdalla, ja patsaat ja paksut kaaret niiden kohdalla.
verses.king_james: And he made a porch of pillars; the length thereof was fifty cubits, and the breadth thereof thirty cubits: and the porch was before them: and the other pillars and the thick beam were before them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porticum quoque solii, in qua tribunal est, fecit : et texit lignis cedrinis a pavimento usque ad summitatem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאוּלָ֤ם הַכִּסֵּא֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִשְׁפׇּט־שָׁ֔ם אֻלָ֥ם הַמִּשְׁפָּ֖ט עָשָׂ֑ה וְסָפ֣וּן בָּאֶ֔רֶז מֵהַקַּרְקַ֖ע עַד־הַקַּרְקָֽע׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also the porch of the throne wherein is the seat of judgment; and covered it with cedar wood from the floor to the top.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja myös tuomio-istuimen esihuoneen tuomitaksensa siinä; tuomio-istuimen hän teki ja peitti molemmat permannot sedripuilla,
verses.king_james: Then he made a porch for the throne where he might judge, even the porch of judgment: and it was covered with cedar from one side of the floor to the other.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et domuncula, in qua sedebatur ad judicandum, erat in media porticu simili opere. Domum quoque fecit filiæ Pharaonis (quam uxorem duxerat Salomon) tali opere, quali et hanc porticum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֵיתוֹ֩ אֲשֶׁר־יֵ֨שֶׁב שָׁ֜ם חָצֵ֣ר הָאַחֶ֗רֶת מִבֵּית֙ לָאוּלָ֔ם כַּמַּעֲשֶׂ֥ה הַזֶּ֖ה הָיָ֑ה וּבַ֜יִת יַעֲשֶׂ֤ה לְבַת־פַּרְעֹה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לָקַ֣ח שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה כָּאוּלָ֖ם הַזֶּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And in the midst of the porch, was a small house, where he sat in judgment of the like work. He made also a house for the daughter of Pharao (whom Solomon had taken to wife) of the same work, as this porch;
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös omaan huoneesensa, jossa hän itse asui, toisen pihan sisälliselle puolelle esihuonetta, joka oli tehty niinkuin se toinenkin huone. Hän teki myös huoneen Pharaon tyttärelle, jonka Salomo emännäksensä ottanut oli, sen esihuoneen kaltaisen.
verses.king_james: And his house where he dwelt had another court within the porch, which was of the like work. Solomon made also an house for Pharaoh’s daughter, whom he had taken to wife, like unto this porch.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia lapidibus pretiosis, qui ad normam quamdam atque mensuram tam intrinsecus quam extrinsecus serrati erant : a fundamento usque ad summitatem parietum, et extrinsecus usque ad atrium majus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־אֵ֜לֶּה אֲבָנִ֤ים יְקָרֹת֙ כְּמִדּ֣וֹת גָּזִ֔ית מְגֹרָר֥וֹת בַּמְּגֵרָ֖ה מִבַּ֣יִת וּמִח֑וּץ וּמִמַּסָּד֙ עַד־הַטְּפָח֔וֹת וּמִח֖וּץ עַד־הֶחָצֵ֥ר הַגְּדוֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: All of costly stones, which were sawed by a certain rule and measure, both within and without: from the foundation to the top of the walls, and without, unto the great court.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät kaikki olivat kalliista kivistä, mitan jälkeen vuolluista ja sahalla leikatuista sisältä ja ulkoa, perustuksesta kattoon asti, ja vielä ulkoiselta puolen isoon pihaan saakka.
verses.king_james: All these were of costly stones, according to the measures of hewed stones, sawed with saws, within and without, even from the foundation unto the coping, and so on the outside toward the great court.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fundamenta autem de lapidibus pretiosis, lapidibus magnis, decem sive octo cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמְיֻסָּ֕ד אֲבָנִ֥ים יְקָר֖וֹת אֲבָנִ֣ים גְּדֹל֑וֹת אַבְנֵי֙ עֶ֣שֶׂר אַמּ֔וֹת וְאַבְנֵ֖י שְׁמֹנֶ֥ה אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the foundations were of costly stones, great stones of ten cubits or eight cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Perustukset olivat myös kallista kivistä ja suurista kivistä: kymmenen kyynärän kivistä ja kahdeksan kyynärän kivistä.
verses.king_james: And the foundation was of costly stones, even great stones, stones of ten cubits, and stones of eight cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et desuper lapides pretiosi æqualis mensuræ secti erant, similiterque de cedro.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִלְמַ֗עְלָה אֲבָנִ֧ים יְקָר֛וֹת כְּמִדּ֥וֹת גָּזִ֖ית וָאָֽרֶז׃
verses.douay_rheims: And above there were costly stones of equal measure hewed, and in like manner planks of cedar.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niiden päällä oli muita kalliita kiviä mitan jälkeen vuoltuja ja myös sedripuita.
verses.king_james: And above were costly stones, after the measures of hewed stones, and cedars.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et atrium majus rotundum trium ordinum de lapidibus sectis, et unius ordinis de dolata cedro : necnon et in atrio domus Domini interiori, et in porticu domus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָצֵ֨ר הַגְּדוֹלָ֜ה סָבִ֗יב שְׁלֹשָׁה֙ טוּרִ֣ים גָּזִ֔ית וְט֖וּר כְּרֻתֹ֣ת אֲרָזִ֑ים וְלַחֲצַ֧ר בֵּית־יְהֹוָ֛ה הַפְּנִימִ֖ית וּלְאֻלָ֥ם הַבָּֽיִת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the great court was made round with three rows of hewed stones, and one row of planks of cedar, which also was observed in the inner court of the house of the Lord, and in the porch of the house.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta sen suuren pihan ympäri oli kolme riviä vuoltuja kiviä ja yksi rivi sedripuisia lautoja, niin myös Herran huoneen sisäpuolella ja esihuoneen sisällä.
verses.king_james: And the great court round about was with three rows of hewed stones, and a row of cedar beams, both for the inner court of the house of the Lord, and for the porch of the house.

verses.latin_vulgate: Misit quoque rex Salomon, et tulit Hiram de Tyro,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלַח֙ הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה וַיִּקַּ֥ח אֶת־חִירָ֖ם מִצֹּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And king Solomon sent, and brought Hiram from Tyre,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas Salomo lähetti ja noudatti Hiramin Tyrosta,
verses.king_james: And king Solomon sent and fetched Hiram out of Tyre.

verses.latin_vulgate: filium mulieris viduæ de tribu Nephthali, patre Tyrio, artificem ærarium, et plenum sapientia, et intelligentia, et doctrina, ad faciendum omne opus ex ære. Qui cum venisset ad regem Salomonem, fecit omne opus ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אִשָּׁה֩ אַלְמָנָ֨ה ה֜וּא מִמַּטֵּ֣ה נַפְתָּלִ֗י וְאָבִ֣יו אִישׁ־צֹרִי֮ חֹרֵ֣שׁ נְחֹ֒שֶׁת֒ וַ֠יִּמָּלֵ֠א אֶת־הַחׇכְמָ֤ה וְאֶת־הַתְּבוּנָה֙ וְאֶת־הַדַּ֔עַת לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת כׇּל־מְלָאכָ֖ה בַּנְּחֹ֑שֶׁת וַיָּבוֹא֙ אֶל־הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה וַיַּ֖עַשׂ אֶת־כׇּל־מְלַאכְתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The son of a widow woman, of the tribe of Nephthali, whose father was a Tyrian, an artificer in brass, and full of wisdom, and understanding, and skill to work all work in brass. And when he was come to king Solomon, he wrought all his work.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka oli lesken poika Naphtalin suvusta, ja hänen isänsä oli myös ollut Tyrolainen, vaskiseppä; ja hän oli taidolla, ymmärryksellä ja tiedolla lahjoitettu, kaikkinaisia vaskitöitä tekemään. Koska hän tuli kuningas Salomon tykö, niin hän teki kaikki hänen työnsä.
verses.king_james: He was a widow’s son of the tribe of Naphtali, and his father was a man of Tyre, a worker in brass: and he was filled with wisdom, and understanding, and cunning to work all works in brass. And he came to king Solomon, and wrought all his work.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et finxit duas columnas æreas, decem et octo cubitorum altitudinis columnam unam : et linea duodecim cubitorum ambiebat columnam utramque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֛צַר אֶת־שְׁנֵ֥י הָעַמּוּדִ֖ים נְחֹ֑שֶׁת שְׁמֹנֶ֨ה עֶשְׂרֵ֜ה אַמָּ֗ה קוֹמַת֙ הָעַמּ֣וּד הָאֶחָ֔ד וְחוּט֙ שְׁתֵּים־עֶשְׂרֵ֣ה אַמָּ֔ה יָסֹ֖ב אֶת־הָעַמּ֥וּד הַשֵּׁנִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he cast two pillars in brass, each pillar was eighteen cubits high: and a line of twelve cubits compassed both the pillars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän valmisti kaksi vaskipatsasta, kummankin kahdeksantoistakymmentä kyynärää korkiaksi, ja yhden langan kahdentoistakymmenen kyynärän pituiseksi, kumpaakin patsasta ympäriinsä.
verses.king_james: For he cast two pillars of brass, of eighteen cubits high apiece: and a line of twelve cubits did compass either of them about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duo quoque capitella fecit, quæ ponerentur super capita columnarum, fusilia ex ære : quinque cubitorum altitudinis capitellum unum, et quinque cubitorum altitudinis capitellum alterum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁתֵּ֨י כֹתָרֹ֜ת עָשָׂ֗ה לָתֵ֛ת עַל־רָאשֵׁ֥י הָעַמּוּדִ֖ים מֻצַ֣ק נְחֹ֑שֶׁת חָמֵ֣שׁ אַמּ֗וֹת קוֹמַת֙ הַכֹּתֶ֣רֶת הָאֶחָ֔ת וְחָמֵ֣שׁ אַמּ֔וֹת קוֹמַ֖ת הַכֹּתֶ֥רֶת הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also two chapiters of molten brass, to be set upon the tops of the pillars: the height of one chapiter was five cubits, and the height of the other chapiter was five cubits:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki kaksi valettua vaskista kruunua asettaaksensa patsasten päihin; ja kumpikin kruunu oli viisi kyynärää korkia.
verses.king_james: And he made two chapiters of molten brass, to set upon the tops of the pillars: the height of the one chapiter was five cubits, and the height of the other chapiter was five cubits:

verses.latin_vulgate: et quasi in modum retis, et catenarum sibi invicem miro opere contextarum. Utrumque capitellum columnarum fusile erat : septena versuum retiacula in capitello uno, et septena retiacula in capitello altero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׂבָכִ֞ים מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה שְׂבָכָ֗ה גְּדִלִים֙ מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה שַׁרְשְׁר֔וֹת לַכֹּ֣תָרֹ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִ֑ים שִׁבְעָה֙ לַכֹּתֶ֣רֶת הָאֶחָ֔ת וְשִׁבְעָ֖ה לַכֹּתֶ֥רֶת הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a kind of network, and chain work wreathed together with wonderful art. Both the chapiters of the pillars were cast: seven rows of nets were on one chapiter, and seven nets on the other chapiter.
verses.finnish_biblia: Verkot (teki hän) verkon tavalla, ja köydet niin kuin renkaat kruunuihin, jotka olivat ylhäällä patsasten päässä, seitsemän kumpaankin kruunuun.
verses.king_james: And nets of checker work, and wreaths of chain work, for the chapiters which were upon the top of the pillars; seven for the one chapiter, and seven for the other chapiter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et perfecit columnas, et duos ordines per circuitum retiaculorum singulorum, ut tegerent capitella quæ erant super summitatem, malogranatorum : eodem modo fecit et capitello secundo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֖עַשׂ אֶת־הָעַמּוּדִ֑ים וּשְׁנֵי֩ טוּרִ֨ים סָבִ֜יב עַל־הַשְּׂבָכָ֣ה הָאֶחָ֗ת לְכַסּ֤וֹת אֶת־הַכֹּֽתָרֹת֙ אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הָרִמֹּנִ֔ים וְכֵ֣ן עָשָׂ֔ה לַכֹּתֶ֖רֶת הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made the pillars, and two rows round about each network to cover the chapiters, that were upon the top, with pomegranates: and in like manner did he to the other chapiter.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja teki patsaat ja kaksi riviä ympäri yhden verkon päälle, peittämään kruunuja, jotka olivat granatin omenain päällä, ja niin hän myös teki toiselle kruunulle.
verses.king_james: And he made the pillars, and two rows round about upon the one network, to cover the chapiters that were upon the top, with pomegranates: and so did he for the other chapiter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Capitella autem quæ erant super capita columnarum, quasi opere lilii fabricata erant in porticu quatuor cubitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹתָרֹ֗ת אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל־רֹ֣אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִ֔ים מַעֲשֵׂ֖ה שׁוּשַׁ֣ן בָּאוּלָ֑ם אַרְבַּ֖ע אַמּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the chapiters that were upon the top of the pillars, were of lily work, in the porch of four cubits.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne kruunut, jotka olivat patsasten päässä, olivat tehdyt niinkuin kukkaiset esihuoneessa, neljä kyynärää suuret,
verses.king_james: And the chapiters that were upon the top of the pillars were of lily work in the porch, four cubits.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et rursum alia capitella in summitate columnarum desuper juxta mensuram columnæ contra retiacula : malogranatorum autem ducenti ordines erant in circuitu capitelli secundi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְכֹתָרֹ֗ת עַל־שְׁנֵי֙ הָעַמּוּדִ֔ים גַּם־מִמַּ֙עַל֙ מִלְּעֻמַּ֣ת הַבֶּ֔טֶן אֲשֶׁ֖ר לְעֵ֣בֶר (שבכה) [הַשְּׂבָכָ֑ה] וְהָרִמּוֹנִ֤ים מָאתַ֙יִם֙ טֻרִ֣ים סָבִ֔יב עַ֖ל הַכֹּתֶ֥רֶת הַשֵּׁנִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And again there were other chapiters on the top of the pillars above, according to the measure of the pillar over against the network: and of pomegranates there were two hundred, in rows round about the other chapiter.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kruunut kahden patsaan päällä ylhäällä keskipaikan kohdalla, jonka päällä verkko oli, ja kaksisataa granatin omenaa rivittäin ympärinsä toisen kruunun päällä.
verses.king_james: And the chapiters upon the two pillars had pomegranates also above, over against the belly which was by the network: and the pomegranates were two hundred in rows round about upon the other chapiter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et statuit duas columnas in porticu templi : cumque statuisset columnam dexteram, vocavit eam nomine Jachin : similiter erexit columnam secundam, et vocavit nomen ejus Booz.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֙קֶם֙ אֶת־הָֽעַמֻּדִ֔ים לְאֻלָ֖ם הַהֵיכָ֑ל וַיָּ֜קֶם אֶת־הָעַמּ֣וּד הַיְמָנִ֗י וַיִּקְרָ֤א אֶת־שְׁמוֹ֙ יָכִ֔ין וַיָּ֙קֶם֙ אֶת־הָעַמּ֣וּד הַשְּׂמָאלִ֔י וַיִּקְרָ֥א אֶת־שְׁמ֖וֹ בֹּֽעַז׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he set up the two pillars in the porch of the temple: and when he had set up the pillar on the right hand, he called the name thereof Jachin: in like manner he set up the second pillar, and called the name thereof Booz.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän nosti ne patsaat templin esihuoneen eteen, ja sen patsaan, jonka hän oikialle puolelle asetti, kutsui hän Jakin, ja sen patsaan, jonka hän asetti vasemmalle puolelle, kutsui hän Boas.
verses.king_james: And he set up the pillars in the porch of the temple: and he set up the right pillar, and called the name thereof Jachin: and he set up the left pillar, and called the name thereof Boaz.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et super capita columnarum opus in modum lilii posuit : perfectumque est opus columnarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֛ל רֹ֥אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִ֖ים מַעֲשֵׂ֣ה שׁוֹשָׁ֑ן וַתִּתֹּ֖ם מְלֶ֥אכֶת הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And upon the tops of the pillars he made lily work: so the work of the pillars was finished.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne seisoivat patsasten päissä, tehdyt niinkuin kukkaiset; ja niin päätettiin patsasten teko.
verses.king_james: And upon the top of the pillars was lily work: so was the work of the pillars finished.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque mare fusile decem cubitorum a labio usque ad labium, rotundum in circuitu : quinque cubitorum altitudo ejus, et resticula triginta cubitorum cingebat illud per circuitum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַשׂ אֶת־הַיָּ֖ם מוּצָ֑ק עֶ֣שֶׂר בָּ֠אַמָּ֠ה מִשְּׂפָת֨וֹ עַד־שְׂפָת֜וֹ עָגֹ֣ל ׀ סָבִ֗יב וְחָמֵ֤שׁ בָּֽאַמָּה֙ קוֹמָת֔וֹ (וקוה) [וְקָו֙] שְׁלֹשִׁ֣ים בָּאַמָּ֔ה יָסֹ֥ב אֹת֖וֹ סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also a molten sea, of ten cubits, from brim to brim, round all about; the height of it was five cubits, and a line of thirty cubits compassed it round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki valetun järven kymmenen kyynärää leviän, yhdestä partaasta niin toiseen ympyriäisen ja viisi kyynärää korkian, ja nuora, kolmekymmentä kyynärää pitkä, kävi sen ympäri.
verses.king_james: And he made a molten sea, ten cubits from the one brim to the other: it was round all about, and his height was five cubits: and a line of thirty cubits did compass it round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sculptura subter labium circuibat illud decem cubitis ambiens mare : duo ordines sculpturarum striatarum erant fusiles.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפְקָעִים֩ מִתַּ֨חַת לִשְׂפָת֤וֹ ׀ סָבִיב֙ סֹבְבִ֣ים אֹת֔וֹ עֶ֚שֶׂר בָּאַמָּ֔ה מַקִּפִ֥ים אֶת־הַיָּ֖ם סָבִ֑יב שְׁנֵ֤י טוּרִים֙ הַפְּקָעִ֔ים יְצֻקִ֖ים בִּיצֻֽקָתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a graven work, under the brim of it, compassed it for ten cubits going about the sea: there were two rows cast of chamfered sculptures.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nupit olivat järven partaan alla, jotka kävivät sen ympäri, kymmenen jokaisella kyynärällä järveä ympäri; ja nupit olivat kokonansa valetut kahteen riviin.
verses.king_james: And under the brim of it round about there were knops compassing it, ten in a cubit, compassing the sea round about: the knops were cast in two rows, when it was cast.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et stabat super duodecim boves, e quibus tres respiciebant ad aquilonem, et tres ad occidentem, et tres ad meridiem, et tres ad orientem : et mare super eos desuper erat : quorum posteriora universa intrinsecus latitabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֹמֵ֞ד עַל־שְׁנֵ֧י עָשָׂ֣ר בָּקָ֗ר שְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה פֹנִ֣ים ׀ צָפ֡וֹנָה וּשְׁלֹשָׁה֩ פֹנִ֨ים ׀ יָ֜מָּה וּשְׁלֹשָׁ֣ה ׀ פֹּנִ֣ים נֶ֗גְבָּה וּשְׁלֹשָׁה֙ פֹּנִ֣ים מִזְרָ֔חָה וְהַיָּ֥ם עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם מִלְמָ֑עְלָה וְכׇל־אֲחֹרֵיהֶ֖ם בָּֽיְתָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it stood upon twelve oxen, of which three looked towards the north, and three towards the west, and three towards the south, and three towards the east: and the sea was above upon them, and their hinder parts were all hid within.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se seisoi kahdentoistakymmenen härjän päällä: kolme heistä käänsi itsensä pohjoiseen, kolme länteen, kolme etelään, ja kolme itään päin; ja se järvi oli ylhäällä heidän päällänsä, ja kaikki heidän takaiset puolensa sisällekäsin.
verses.king_james: It stood upon twelve oxen, three looking toward the north, and three looking toward the west, and three looking toward the south, and three looking toward the east: and the sea was set above upon them, and all their hinder parts were inward.

verses.latin_vulgate: Grossitudo autem luteris, trium unciarum erat : labiumque ejus quasi labium calicis, et folium repandi lilii : duo millia batos capiebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעׇבְי֣וֹ טֶ֔פַח וּשְׂפָת֛וֹ כְּמַעֲשֵׂ֥ה שְׂפַת־כּ֖וֹס פֶּ֣רַח שׁוֹשָׁ֑ן אַלְפַּ֥יִם בַּ֖ת יָכִֽיל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the laver was a hand breadth thick: and the brim thereof was like the brim of a cup, or the leaf of a crisped lily: it contained two thousand bates.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja se oli kämmenen paksuus, ja sen parras oli tekoansa niinkuin maljan parras ja niinkuin ulospuhkeeva kukkainen; ja se veti kaksituhatta batia.
verses.king_james: And it was an hand breadth thick, and the brim thereof was wrought like the brim of a cup, with flowers of lilies: it contained two thousand baths.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et fecit decem bases æneas, quatuor cubitorum longitudinis bases singulas, et quatuor cubitorum latitudinis, et trium cubitorum altitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֧עַשׂ אֶת־הַמְּכֹנ֛וֹת עֶ֖שֶׂר נְחֹ֑שֶׁת אַרְבַּ֣ע בָּאַמָּ֗ה אֹ֚רֶךְ הַמְּכוֹנָ֣ה הָאֶחָ֔ת וְאַרְבַּ֤ע בָּֽאַמָּה֙ רׇחְבָּ֔הּ וְשָׁלֹ֥שׁ בָּאַמָּ֖ה קוֹמָתָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he made ten bases of brass, every base was four cubits in length, and four cubits in breadth, and three cubits high.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän teki myös kymmenen vaskista istuinta; neljä kyynärää oli itsekukin istuin pitkä ja neljä kyynärää leviä, vaan kolmekyynärää korkia.
verses.king_james: And he made ten bases of brass; four cubits was the length of one base, and four cubits the breadth thereof, and three cubits the height of it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ipsum opus basium, interrasile erat : et sculpturæ inter juncturas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֶ֛ה מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה הַמְּכוֹנָ֖ה מִסְגְּרֹ֣ת לָהֶ֑ם וּמִסְגְּרֹ֖ת בֵּ֥ין הַשְׁלַבִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the work itself of the bases, was intergraven: and there were gravings between the joinings.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne istuimet olivat niin tehdyt, että niissä olivat laidat; ja ne laidat olivat palletten välillä.
verses.king_james: And the work of the bases was on this manner: they had borders, and the borders were between the ledges:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et inter coronulas et plectas, leones et boves et cherubim, et in juncturis similiter desuper : et subter leones et boves, quasi lora ex ære dependentia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַֽל־הַמִּסְגְּר֞וֹת אֲשֶׁ֣ר ׀ בֵּ֣ין הַשְׁלַבִּ֗ים אֲרָי֤וֹת ׀ בָּקָר֙ וּכְרוּבִ֔ים וְעַל־הַשְׁלַבִּ֖ים כֵּ֣ן מִמָּ֑עַל וּמִתַּ֙חַת֙ לַאֲרָי֣וֹת וְלַבָּקָ֔ר לֹי֖וֹת מַעֲשֵׂ֥ה מוֹרָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And between the little crowns and the ledges, were lions, and oxen, and cherubims; and in the joinings likewise above: and under the lions and oxen, as it were bands of brass hanging down.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja laidoissa palletten välillä olivat jalopeurat, härjät ja Kerubimit, ja palletten päällä ylhäällä oli vahva virvanto; mutta jalopeurain ja härkäin alla olivat venytetyt jatkokset.
verses.king_james: And on the borders that were between the ledges were lions, oxen, and cherubims: and upon the ledges there was a base above: and beneath the lions and oxen were certain additions made of thin work.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et quatuor rotæ per bases singulas, et axes ærei : et per quatuor partes quasi humeruli subter luterem fusiles, contra se invicem respectantes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבָּעָה֩ אוֹפַנֵּ֨י נְחֹ֜שֶׁת לַמְּכוֹנָ֤ה הָאַחַת֙ וְסַרְנֵ֣י נְחֹ֔שֶׁת וְאַרְבָּעָ֥ה פַעֲמֹתָ֖יו כְּתֵפֹ֣ת לָהֶ֑ם מִתַּ֤חַת לַכִּיֹּר֙ הַכְּתֵפ֣וֹת יְצֻק֔וֹת מֵעֵ֥בֶר אִ֖ישׁ לֹיֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And every base had four wheels, and axletrees of brass: and at the four sides were undersetters, under the laver molten, looking one against another.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jokaisella istuimella oli neljä vaskista ratasta vaskisten ijesten kanssa, ja niissä olivat neljällä kulmalla niskat, jotka niskat olivat kattilaan alle valetut, kunkin jatkoksen kohdalle.
verses.king_james: And every base had four brasen wheels, and plates of brass: and the four corners thereof had undersetters: under the laver were undersetters molten, at the side of every addition.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os quoque luteris intrinsecus erat in capitis summitate : et quod forinsecus apparebat, unius cubiti erat totum rotundum, pariterque habebat unum cubitum et dimidium : in angulis autem columnarum variæ cælaturæ erant : et media intercolumnia, quadrata non rotunda.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּ֠פִ֠יהוּ מִבֵּ֨ית לַכֹּתֶ֤רֶת וָמַ֙עְלָה֙ בָּֽאַמָּ֔ה וּפִ֙יהָ֙ עָגֹ֣ל מַעֲשֵׂה־כֵ֔ן אַמָּ֖ה וַחֲצִ֣י הָאַמָּ֑ה וְגַם־עַל־פִּ֙יהָ֙ מִקְלָע֔וֹת וּמִסְגְּרֹתֵיהֶ֥ם מְרֻבָּע֖וֹת לֹ֥א עֲגֻלּֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: The mouth also of the laver within, was in the top of the chapiter: and that which appeared without, was of one cubit all round, and together it was one cubit and a half: and in the corners of the pillars were divers engravings: and the spaces between the pillars were square, not round.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sen koverrus oli seppeleen sisäpuolelta kyynärää korkia, jonka keskus oli puolitoista kyynärää leviä: olivat myös sen vierellä leikkaukset; mutta niiden laidat olivat nelitahkoiset ja ei ympyriäiset.
verses.king_james: And the mouth of it within the chapiter and above was a cubit: but the mouth thereof was round after the work of the base, a cubit and an half: and also upon the mouth of it were gravings with their borders, foursquare, not round.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quatuor quoque rotæ quæ per quatuor angulos basis erant, cohærebant sibi subter basim : una rota habebat altitudinis cubitum et semis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבַּ֣עַת הָאוֹפַנִּ֗ים לְמִתַּ֙חַת֙ לַֽמִּסְגְּר֔וֹת וִיד֥וֹת הָאוֹפַנִּ֖ים בַּמְּכוֹנָ֑ה וְקוֹמַת֙ הָאוֹפַ֣ן הָאֶחָ֔ד אַמָּ֖ה וַחֲצִ֥י הָאַמָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the four wheels, which were at the four corners of the base, were joined one to another under the base: the height of a wheel was a cubit and a half.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan ne neljä ratasta seisoi juuri laitain alla, ja ratasten ikeet olivat istuinta liki; jokainen ratas oli puolitoista kyynärää korkia.
verses.king_james: And under the borders were four wheels; and the axletrees of the wheels were joined to the base: and the height of a wheel was a cubit and half a cubit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tales autem rotæ erant quales solent in curru fieri : et axes earum, et radii, et canthi, et modioli, omnia fusilia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַֽעֲשֵׂה֙ הָא֣וֹפַנִּ֔ים כְּמַעֲשֵׂ֖ה אוֹפַ֣ן הַמֶּרְכָּבָ֑ה יְדוֹתָ֣ם וְגַבֵּיהֶ֗ם וְחִשֻּׁקֵיהֶ֛ם וְחִשֻּׁרֵיהֶ֖ם הַכֹּ֥ל מוּצָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they were such wheels as are used to be made in a chariot: and their axletrees, and spokes, and strakes, and naves, were all cast.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pyörät olivat tehdyt niinkuin vaunuin pyörät, ja heidän napansa, kappansa, kehrävartensa ja kierunsa olivat kaikki valetut.
verses.king_james: And the work of the wheels was like the work of a chariot wheel: their axletrees, and their naves, and their felloes, and their spokes, were all molten.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam et humeruli illi quatuor per singulos angulos basis unius, ex ipsa basi fusiles et conjuncti erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַרְבַּ֣ע כְּתֵפ֔וֹת אֶ֚ל אַרְבַּ֣ע פִּנּ֔וֹת הַמְּכֹנָ֖ה הָאֶחָ֑ת מִן־הַמְּכֹנָ֖ה כְּתֵפֶֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the four undersetters, that were at every corner of each base, were of the base itself, cast and joined together.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne neljä niskaa jokaisen istuimen neljässä kulmassa oli myös istuimessa kiinni.
verses.king_james: And there were four undersetters to the four corners of one base: and the undersetters were of the very base itself.

verses.latin_vulgate: In summitate autem basis erat quædam rotunditas dimidii cubiti, ita fabrefacta ut luter desuper posset imponi, habens cælaturas suas, variasque sculpturas ex semetipsa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְרֹ֣אשׁ הַמְּכוֹנָ֗ה חֲצִ֧י הָאַמָּ֛ה קוֹמָ֖ה עָגֹ֣ל ׀ סָבִ֑יב וְעַ֨ל רֹ֤אשׁ הַמְּכֹנָה֙ יְדֹתֶ֔יהָ וּמִסְגְּרֹתֶ֖יהָ מִמֶּֽנָּה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And on the top of the base, there was a round compass of half a cubit, so wrought that the laver might be set thereon, having its gravings, and divers sculptures of itself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja istuimen päässä oli puolen kyynärän korkeus, joka oli kokonansa ympyriäinen; oli myös kunkin istuimen päässä heidän kahvansa, ja hänen laitansa olivat itse hänestä.
verses.king_james: And in the top of the base was there a round compass of half a cubit high: and on the top of the base the ledges thereof and the borders thereof were of the same.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sculpsit quoque in tabulatis illis quæ erant ex ære, et in angulis, cherubim, et leones, et palmas, quasi in similitudinem hominis stantis, ut non cælata, sed apposita per circuitum viderentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְפַתַּ֤ח עַל־הַלֻּחֹת֙ יְדֹתֶ֔יהָ וְעַל֙ (ומסגרתיה) [מִסְגְּרֹתֶ֔יהָ] כְּרוּבִ֖ים אֲרָי֣וֹת וְתִמֹרֹ֑ת כְּמַעַר־אִ֥ישׁ וְלֹי֖וֹת סָבִֽיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: He engraved also in those plates, which were of brass, and in the corners, cherubims, and lions, and palm trees, in likeness of a man standing, so that they seemed not to be engraven, but added round about.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän antoi kaivaa takaisiin paikkoihin, kahvoihin ja laitoihin, Kerubimit, jalopeurat ja palmupuita, toinen toisensa tykö ympäri.
verses.king_james: For on the plates of the ledges thereof, and on the borders thereof, he graved cherubims, lions, and palm trees, according to the proportion of every one, and additions round about.

verses.latin_vulgate: In hunc modum fecit decem bases, fusura una, et mensura, sculpturaque consimili.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כָּזֹ֣את עָשָׂ֔ה אֵ֖ת עֶ֣שֶׂר הַמְּכֹנ֑וֹת מוּצָ֨ק אֶחָ֜ד מִדָּ֥ה אַחַ֛ת קֶ֥צֶב אֶחָ֖ד לְכֻלָּֽהְנָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: After this manner, he made ten bases, of one casting and measure, and the like graving.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin teki hän ne kymmenen valettua istuinta: heillä kaikilla oli yksi muoto, yksi mitta, yksi sia.
verses.king_james: After this manner he made the ten bases: all of them had one casting, one measure, and one size.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit quoque decem luteres æneos : quadraginta batos capiebat luter unus, eratque quatuor cubitorum : singulos quoque luteres per singulas, id est, decem bases, posuit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֛עַשׂ עֲשָׂרָ֥ה כִיֹּר֖וֹת נְחֹ֑שֶׁת אַרְבָּעִ֨ים בַּ֜ת יָכִ֣יל ׀ הַכִּיּ֣וֹר הָאֶחָ֗ד אַרְבַּ֤ע בָּֽאַמָּה֙ הַכִּיּ֣וֹר הָאֶחָ֔ד כִּיּ֤וֹר אֶחָד֙ עַל־הַמְּכוֹנָ֣ה הָאַחַ֔ת לְעֶ֖שֶׂר הַמְּכֹנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: He made also ten lavers of brass: one laver contained four bates, and was of four cubits: and upon every base, in all ten, he put as many lavers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän teki kymmenen vaskikattilaa; niin että kukin kattila veti neljäkymmentä batia, ja kukin kattila oli neljä kyynärää suuri, yksi kattila oli yhden istuimen päällä, ja niin kymmenellä istuimella.
verses.king_james: Then made he ten lavers of brass: one laver contained forty baths: and every laver was four cubits: and upon every one of the ten bases one laver.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et constituit decem bases, quinque ad dexteram partem templi, et quinque ad sinistram : mare autem posuit ad dexteram partem templi contra orientem ad meridiem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּן֙ אֶת־הַמְּכֹנ֔וֹת חָמֵ֞שׁ עַל־כֶּ֤תֶף הַבַּ֙יִת֙ מִיָּמִ֔ין וְחָמֵ֛שׁ עַל־כֶּ֥תֶף הַבַּ֖יִת מִשְּׂמֹאל֑וֹ וְאֶת־הַיָּ֗ם נָתַ֞ן מִכֶּ֨תֶף הַבַּ֧יִת הַיְמָנִ֛ית קֵ֖דְמָה מִמּ֥וּל נֶֽגֶב׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And he set the ten bases, five on the right side of the temple, and five on the left: and the sea he put on the right side of the temple, over against the east southward.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän asetti viisi istuinta huoneen oikialle sivulle ja toiset viisi sen vasemmalle sivulle; mutta järven pani hän huoneen oikialle sivulle eteen, idän puoleen, etelän kohdalle.
verses.king_james: And he put five bases on the right side of the house, and five on the left side of the house: and he set the sea on the right side of the house eastward over against the south.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit ergo Hiram lebetes, et scutras, et hamulas, et perfecit omne opus regis Salomonis in templo Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ חִיר֔וֹם אֶ֨ת־הַכִּיֹּר֔וֹת וְאֶת־הַיָּעִ֖ים וְאֶת־הַמִּזְרָק֑וֹת וַיְכַ֣ל חִירָ֗ם לַֽעֲשׂוֹת֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הַמְּלָאכָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָׂ֛ה לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Hiram made cauldrons, and shovels, and basins, and finished all the work of king Solomon in the temple of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hiram teki myös patoja, lapioita ja maljoja; ja niin Hiram päätti kaiken työn, minkä hän teki kuningas Salomolle Herran huoneesen:
verses.king_james: And Hiram made the lavers, and the shovels, and the basons. So Hiram made an end of doing all the work that he made king Solomon for the house of the Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: Columnas duas, et funiculos capitellorum super capitella columnarum duos : et retiacula duo, ut operirent duos funiculos qui erant super capita columnarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַמֻּדִ֣ים שְׁנַ֔יִם וְגֻלֹּ֧ת הַכֹּתָרֹ֛ת אֲשֶׁר־עַל־רֹ֥אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִ֖ים שְׁתָּ֑יִם וְהַשְּׂבָכ֣וֹת שְׁתַּ֔יִם לְכַסּ֗וֹת אֶת־שְׁתֵּי֙ גֻּלּ֣וֹת הַכֹּתָרֹ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־רֹ֥אשׁ הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The two pillars and the two cords of the chapiters, upon the chapiters of the pillars: and the two networks, to cover the two cords, that were upon the top of the pillars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ne kaksi patsasta ja ne kaksi ympyriäistä kruunua, jotka kahden patsaan päällä olivat, ja ne kaksi verkkoa, peittämään kahta ympyriäistä kruunua, patsasten päässä;
verses.king_james: The two pillars, and the two bowls of the chapiters that were on the top of the two pillars; and the two networks, to cover the two bowls of the chapiters which were upon the top of the pillars;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et malogranata quadringenta in duobus retiaculis : duos versus malogranatorum in retiaculis singulis, ad operiendos funiculos capitellorum qui erant super capita columnarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הָרִמֹּנִ֛ים אַרְבַּ֥ע מֵא֖וֹת לִשְׁתֵּ֣י הַשְּׂבָכ֑וֹת שְׁנֵֽי־טוּרִ֤ים רִמֹּנִים֙ לַשְּׂבָכָ֣ה הָאֶחָ֔ת לְכַסּ֗וֹת אֶת־שְׁתֵּי֙ גֻּלּ֣וֹת הַכֹּתָרֹ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י הָעַמּוּדִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And four hundred pomegranates for the two networks: two rows of pomegranates for each network, to cover the cords of the chapiters, which were upon the tops of the pillars.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne neljäsataa granatin omenaa, kahden verkon päällä, ja kaksi riviä granatin omenia, kunkin verkon päällä, peittämään kahta ympyriäistä kruunua patsasten päässä;
verses.king_james: And four hundred pomegranates for the two networks, even two rows of pomegranates for one network, to cover the two bowls of the chapiters that were upon the pillars;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et bases decem, et luteres decem super bases.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַמְּכֹנ֖וֹת עָ֑שֶׂר וְאֶת־הַכִּיֹּרֹ֥ת עֲשָׂרָ֖ה עַל־הַמְּכֹנֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the ten bases, and the ten lavers on the bases.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja ne kymmenen istuinta ja kymmenen kattilaa istuinten päällä;
verses.king_james: And the ten bases, and ten lavers on the bases;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et mare unum, et boves duodecim subter mare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַיָּ֖ם הָאֶחָ֑ד וְאֶת־הַבָּקָ֥ר שְׁנֵים־עָשָׂ֖ר תַּ֥חַת הַיָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And one sea, and twelve oxen under the sea.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja yhden järven ja kaksitoistakymmentä härkää järven alle:
verses.king_james: And one sea, and twelve oxen under the sea;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et lebetes, et scutras, et hamulas, omnia vasa quæ fecit Hiram regi Salomoni in domo Domini, de auricalco erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַסִּיר֨וֹת וְאֶת־הַיָּעִ֜ים וְאֶת־הַמִּזְרָק֗וֹת וְאֵת֙ כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֣ים (האהל) [הָאֵ֔לֶּה] אֲשֶׁ֨ר עָשָׂ֥ה חִירָ֛ם לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה נְחֹ֖שֶׁת מְמֹרָֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the cauldrons, and the shovels, and the basins. All the vessels that Hiram made for king Solomon, for the house of the Lord, were of fine brass.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja padat, lapiot ja maljat, ja kaikki nämä astiat, jotka Hiram teki kuningas Salomolle Herran huoneesen, selkiästä vaskesta.
verses.king_james: And the pots, and the shovels, and the basons: and all these vessels, which Hiram made to king Solomon for the house of the Lord, were of bright brass.

verses.latin_vulgate: In campestri regione Jordanis fudit ea rex in argillosa terra, inter Sochoth et Sarthan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּכִכַּ֤ר הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ יְצָקָ֣ם הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ בְּמַעֲבֵ֖ה הָאֲדָמָ֑ה בֵּ֥ין סֻכּ֖וֹת וּבֵ֥ין צָרְתָֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the plains of the Jordan, did the king cast them in a clay ground, between Socoth and Sartham.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jordanin kedolla antoi kuningas Salomo ne valaa, savisessa töyrässä Sukkotin ja Zartanin välillä.
verses.king_james: In the plain of Jordan did the king cast them, in the clay ground between Succoth and Zarthan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posuit Salomon omnia vasa : propter multitudinem autem nimiam non erat pondus æris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּנַּ֤ח שְׁלֹמֹה֙ אֶת־כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֔ים מֵרֹ֖ב מְאֹ֣ד מְאֹ֑ד לֹ֥א נֶחְקַ֖ר מִשְׁקַ֥ל הַנְּחֹֽשֶׁת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon placed all the vessels: but for its exceeding great multitude the brass could not be weighed.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo antoi kaikki nämä astiat olla (punnitsemata); sillä vaskea oli ylen paljo: ei kysytty vasken painoa.
verses.king_james: And Solomon left all the vessels unweighed, because they were exceeding many: neither was the weight of the brass found out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecitque Salomon omnia vasa in domo Domini : altare aureum, et mensam super quam ponerentur panes propositionis, auream :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ שְׁלֹמֹ֔ה אֵ֚ת כׇּל־הַכֵּלִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֖ר בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה אֵ֚ת מִזְבַּ֣ח הַזָּהָ֔ב וְאֶת־הַשֻּׁלְחָ֗ן אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָלָ֛יו לֶ֥חֶם הַפָּנִ֖ים זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon made all the vessels for the house of the Lord: the altar of gold, and the table of gold, upon which the loaves of proposition should be set:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Salomo teki kaikki kalut, mitkä Herran huoneessa tarvittiin: kultaisen alttarin ja kultaisen pöydän, jolla näkyleivät pidettiin,
verses.king_james: And Solomon made all the vessels that pertained unto the house of the Lord: the altar of gold, and the table of gold, whereupon the shewbread was,

verses.latin_vulgate: et candelabra aurea, quinque ad dexteram, et quinque ad sinistram contra oraculum, ex auro puro : et quasi lilii flores, et lucernas desuper aureas : et forcipes aureos,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־הַ֠מְּנֹר֠וֹת חָמֵ֨שׁ מִיָּמִ֜ין וְחָמֵ֧שׁ מִשְּׂמֹ֛אול לִפְנֵ֥י הַדְּבִ֖יר זָהָ֣ב סָג֑וּר וְהַפֶּ֧רַח וְהַנֵּרֹ֛ת וְהַמֶּלְקַחַ֖יִם זָהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the golden candlesticks, five on the right hand, and five on the left, over against the oracle, of pure gold: and the flowers like lilies, and the lamps over them of gold: and golden snuffers,
verses.finnish_biblia: Viisi kynttiläjalkaa oikialle ja viisi vasemmalle puolelle kuorin eteen, puhtaasta kullasta, kultaisten kukkaisten, lamppuin ja niistinten kanssa,
verses.king_james: And the candlesticks of pure gold, five on the right side, and five on the left, before the oracle, with the flowers, and the lamps, and the tongs of gold,

verses.latin_vulgate: et hydrias, et fuscinulas, et phialas, et mortariola, et thuribula, de auro purissimo : et cardines ostiorum domus interioris Sancti sanctorum, et ostiorum domus templi, ex auro erant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֠הַסִּפּ֠וֹת וְהַֽמְזַמְּר֧וֹת וְהַמִּזְרָק֛וֹת וְהַכַּפּ֥וֹת וְהַמַּחְתּ֖וֹת זָהָ֣ב סָג֑וּר וְהַפֹּת֡וֹת לְדַלְתוֹת֩ הַבַּ֨יִת הַפְּנִימִ֜י לְקֹ֣דֶשׁ הַקֳּדָשִׁ֗ים לְדַלְתֵ֥י הַבַּ֛יִת לַהֵיכָ֖ל זָהָֽב׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And pots, and fleshhooks, and bowls, and mortars, and censers, of most pure gold: and the hinges for the doors of the inner house of the holy of holies, and for the doors of the house of the temple, were of gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös maljoja, vateja, kuppeja, lusikoita ja pannuja puhtaasta kullasta; ja olivat huoneen saranat huoneen sisimäisissä ovissa, joka oli se kaikkein pyhin, ja templin huoneen oven saranat aivan puhtaasta kullasta.
verses.king_james: And the bowls, and the snuffers, and the basons, and the spoons, and the censers of pure gold; and the hinges of gold, both for the doors of the inner house, the most holy place, and for the doors of the house, to wit, of the temple.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et perfecit omne opus quod faciebat Salomon in domo Domini, et intulit quæ sanctificaverat David pater suus, argentum, et aurum, et vasa, reposuitque in thesauris domus Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּשְׁלַם֙ כׇּל־הַמְּלָאכָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשָׂ֛ה הַמֶּ֥לֶךְ שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה בֵּ֣ית יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיָּבֵ֨א שְׁלֹמֹ֜ה אֶת־קׇדְשֵׁ֣י ׀ דָּוִ֣ד אָבִ֗יו אֶת־הַכֶּ֤סֶף וְאֶת־הַזָּהָב֙ וְאֶת־הַכֵּלִ֔ים נָתַ֕ן בְּאֹצְר֖וֹת בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And Solomon finished all the work that he made in the house of the Lord, and brought in the things that David, his father, had dedicated, the silver and the gold, and the vessels, and laid them up in the treasures of the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Näin kaikki työ päätettiin, minkä kuningas Salomo teki Herran huoneesen. Ja Salomo kantoi sinne kaikki mitä hänen isänsä David pyhittänyt oli, hopiaa ja kultaa, ja astioita, ja pani Herran huoneen tavaroihin.
verses.king_james: So was ended all the work that king Solomon made for the house of the Lord. And Solomon brought in the things which David his father had dedicated; even the silver, and the gold, and the vessels, did he put among the treasures of the house of the Lord.
